overall.description: A static cinematic view from a game engine showcasing a futuristic sci-fi cityscape with towering glass buildings, an elevated walkway, and a canal. Flying vehicles occasionally pass through the overcast sky, emphasizing the cyberpunk aesthetic of the metropolis.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade overlooking futuristic metropolis

events.description: flying vehicle enters frame from upper left, moving horizontally across the sky
second flying vehicle appears in upper left while first vehicle continues trajectory

agents.ego_description: standing stationary on an elevated walkway, overlooking the futuristic cityscape and canal below

notable_agents.action: small flying vehicle moving across the sky from left to right above the buildings

entered.detail: tall futuristic tower with orange accents and large 05 signage near the top
water canal running parallel to the walkway with industrial concrete edges
complex multi-level pedestrian bridge with metal railings and industrial architecture
cluster of futuristic glass and steel skyscrapers forming the dense city skyline
illuminated advertising screens with pink and red graphics mounted on building facades
metal safety railing in immediate foreground with horizontal bars

segments.scene_description: A stationary view from an elevated walkway overlooking a futuristic cyberpunk cityscape. The scene is dominated by a prominent central tower marked with 05, a canal running along the left side, and dense futuristic glass architecture. Flying vehicles occasionally traverse the overcast sky, adding subtle dynamic movement to the cinematic composition.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic perspective over a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis under a heavy, overcast sky. It begins from a fixed vantage point on an elevated walkway, framing a dense expanse of glass architecture and a canal that flows along the left side of the view. As the camera lingers, the composition centers on a prominent tower marked with the number 05, which anchors the surrounding urban sprawl. The scene remains atmospheric and still, punctuated only by the occasional movement of flying vehicles traversing the gray horizon.
